ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Whether the user is male (true) or female (false) */,
  "area_income" REAL /* Area income of the user */,
  "daily_internet_usage" REAL /* Daily internet usage of the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user data was collected */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the user (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the user (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user (e.g., single, married) */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user (e.g., sports, music) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "topic_line" TEXT /* Topic line of the ad */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the ad is targeted */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the ad is targeted */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of the ad (e.g., image, video) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the ad (e.g., age, interests) */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the ad (e.g., banner, native) */,
  "ad_category" TEXT /* Category of the ad (e.g., tech, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ads" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the ad */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad */,
  "clicked_on_ad" INTEGER /* Whether the user clicked on the ad (true) or not (false) */,
  "one_hot_test" TEXT /* One-hot test result for the user-ad interaction */,
  "age_band" INTEGER /* Age band of the user (e.g., 20-29, 30-39) */,
  "daily_internet_usage_band" INTEGER /* Daily internet usage band of the user (e.g., 1-100 minutes, 101-200 minutes) */,
  "area_income_band" INTEGER /* Area income band of the user (e.g., $0-10000, $10001-20000) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the user interacted with the ad */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the user interacted with the ad */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the ad */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the ad */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click of the ad */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) of the ad */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the ad */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data point */,
  "test_constant" INTEGER /* Constant value for testing */,
  "test_str_constant" TEXT /* String constant value for testing */,
  "test_bad_column" REAL /* Bad column value for testing (contains NaN values) */,
  "test_binary" TEXT /* Binary value for testing (A or B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interests" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "interest" TEXT /* Interest of the user (e.g., sports, music) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "interest")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_topics" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the ad (e.g., tech, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id", "topic")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_topics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of interest for the user (e.g., tech, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "topic")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_target_audience" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad */,
  "audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the ad (e.g., age, interests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id", "audience")
)
